Operation to perform the zonal testing required in the DC132
commingling agreement. The first step was to close the upper M57 zone and perform the single zone M55 well test. The second step was to close the lower M55 zone and open the upper M57 zone to perform the single zone M57 well test. The third step was to open the lower M55 zone and return to commingling production from both zones after conducting the single zone well tests. These activities was completed between February 12th to February 14th.
